source_code:
def 'bonus_points ('score, 'streak) {
    if (('score gte 90) and ('streak gt 3)) then
        return 'score + 10
    else
        if (('score gte 70) or ('streak gt 5)) then
            return 'score + 5
        else
            return 'score
        fi
    fi
}

paths.path_condition: (('score lt 90) or ('streak lte 3)) and (('score gte 70) or ('streak gt 5))
